mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE module = #{module} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE created_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE operation = #{operation} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
